name: ExtensionSpecimenDefinition_TypeTested_SingleUse
title: R5: Specimen for single use only (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SpecimenDefinition.typeTested.singleUse` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SpecimenDefinition.typeTested.singleUse` 0..1 `boolean`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `SpecimenDefinition.typeTested.singleUse` 0..1 `boolean`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SpecimenDefinition.typeTested.singleUse` has a context of SpecimenDefinition.typeTested based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `SpecimenDefinition`.
Element `SpecimenDefinition.typeTested.singleUse` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Specimen for single use only (new)
element.comment:
Element `SpecimenDefinition.typeTested.singleUse` has a context of SpecimenDefinition.typeTested based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `SpecimenDefinition`.
Element `SpecimenDefinition.typeTested.singleUse` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: Specimen can be used by only one test or panel if the value is "true".
